title: ceratostema lanigerum
intro: Ceratostema lanigerum, also known as woolly ceratostema or woolly lanigerum, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical rainforests of Central and South America. It is a shrub with soft, hairy leaves and purple flowers, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Ceratostema lanigerum is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used in herbal remedies, promoting overall health and well-being.
